title: JadaNaRyby
description: Official ModPack for the JadaNaRyby Server Network
body:
## Official ModPack for [JadaNaRyby](https://jadanaryby.pl/)
> Always make sure you’re using the **latest version** for full compatibility with the **JadaNaRyby Server**.  
> Tuned for maximum performance and stability, inspired by **[Performium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/performium-was-taken)**.

### 🎯 Goals of this modpack
- Boost overall **client performance** for smoother gameplay.
- Add **quality-of-life** improvements like AppleSkin, Do a Barrel Roll, and Capes.
- Include **fun and practical mods** designed for the **JadaNaRyby experience** — such as Plasmo Voice, Emotecraft, and Litematica.
- Keep the game **lightweight and compatible**, even on mid-range setups.

### 🦔 What is JadaNaRyby?
- **JadaNaRyby** is a modern, **community-driven** survival network built around the **vanilla+** philosophy.
- It features **custom items**, **voice chat**, and **optimized performance** — creating a space where players connect through **creativity, cooperation, and fun**.
- Whether you're building, exploring, or just hanging out — **JadaNaRyby** is where it all comes together.

### 💬 Need Help?
- If you need help installing or setting up the modpack, join our [**Discord server**](dc.jadanaryby.pl) and **create a support ticket** — our team will help you get it running in no time.
